result.markdown: --- title: "Week 4: R programming with LLMs" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Using LLMs to assist with R programming ## Pre-class activities * [AI-powered data science using Positron Assistant](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TrN-FMcOsOA) * [How to set up and use AI features in Positron](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VfTxRxZDA4o) * [The ellmer R package](https://ellmer.tidyverse.org/) * [Hadley Wickham on ellmer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ctc2kx3LxG8) ## Slides for week Download pdf ## Assignments * [Assignment 1](../assignments/A1.qmd) is due on Tuesday 31 March.
